SELECT value, sql_neg(value) FROM test_values WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sql_neg(sql_neg(value)) AS double_negation FROM test_values;
SELECT t1.x, sql_neg(t1.x) FROM t1 INNER JOIN test_values ON t1.x = test_values.value;
SELECT sql_neg((SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_values)) AS avg_neg;
SELECT sql_neg(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value < 0) AS negative_values;
